title: Melancholy. A Quatrain.
content:
With shadowy immortelles of memory
 About her brow, she sits with eyes that look
 Upon the stream of Lethe wearily,
 In hesitant hands Death's partly-opened book.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "Melancholy. A Quatrain."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
